# @nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill — PolySkill npm mirror

Automatic npm mirror of the PolySkill skill **@nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill** (v1.0.0),
published so it stays installable from network-restricted environments (e.g.
Claude Code on the web) where `polyskill.ai` is blocked by an egress allowlist
but the npm registry is reachable.

## Install (works inside sandboxes)

```
npm install -g @polyskill/cli
polyskill install @nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill
```

The CLI writes the skill to the location your coding assistant auto-discovers
(e.g. `~/.claude/skills/`). You normally do not depend on this package
directly — `polyskill install` uses it automatically as a fallback when
`polyskill.ai` is unreachable.

Marketplace: https://polyskill.ai
